description: Agentic Coding Engineer building AgentsMail — free, encrypted email for AI agents.

hero.title: Agentic Coding Engineer
hero.p1: From Google Glass OS to apps serving 500M+ users, now building the email infrastructure for AI agents.
hero.p2: I ship products with AI agents. Currently building AgentsMail — free, encrypted email for every AI agent.

item_1.name: AgentsMail
item_1.description: Free email service for AI agents. One API call to get a mailbox and start sending. Encrypted, zero friction, open source.

item_2.name: agents-mail (open source)
item_2.description: The open-source backend powering AgentsMail. Cloudflare Workers + D1, action-oriented API, trust tier system.

item_3.name: AgentsMail ClawHub Skill
item_3.description: Install this skill and your AI agent gets its own email in seconds. 40+ installs on ClawHub.
